mapper.select: SELECT other_user.id AS userId, other_user.nickname AS nickname, m2.content AS lastMessage, m2.created_at AS lastTime, IFNULL(unread.cnt, 0) AS unreadCount FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END AS other_id FROM message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} ) conv JOIN sys_user other_user ON other_user.id = conv.other_id JOIN message m2 ON m2.id = ( SELECT id FROM message WHERE (sender_id = #{userId} AND receiver_id = conv.other_id) OR (sender_id = conv.other_id AND receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sender_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY sender_id ) unread ON unread.sender_id = conv.other_id ORDER BY m2.created_at DESC

SELECT m.id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.content, m.is_read, m.created_at, s.nickname AS sender_name, r.nickname AS receiver_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN sys_user s ON m.sender_id = s.id LEFT JOIN sys_user r ON m.receiver_id = r.id WHERE (m.sender_id = #{userId} AND m.receiver_id = #{otherUserId}) OR (m.sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND m.receiver_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY m.created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (sender_id, receiver_id, content) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1 WHERE sender_id = #{otherUserId} AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, nickname FROM sys_user ORDER BY nickname
